title: Asian Growth Companies With High Insider Ownership To Watch
content:
As global markets navigate geopolitical uncertainties and economic shifts, Asia's growth companies continue to capture investor interest with their potential for robust expansion. In this context, stocks with high insider ownership are particularly noteworthy as they often signal strong confidence from those closest to the company's operations and future prospects.

Top 10 Growth Companies With High Insider Ownership In Asia

Name Insider Ownership Earnings Growth Zhejiang Taotao Vehicles (SZSE:301345) 27.5% 31.5% UTI (KOSDAQ:A179900) 24.6% 113.6% Suzhou Dongshan Precision Manufacturing (SZSE:002384) 33.5% 59.2% Shanghai Biren Technology (SEHK:6082) 11% 121.5% Phison Electronics (TPEX:8299) 10.3% 35.5% L&C BIOLTD (KOSDAQ:A290650) 26% 155% J&V Energy Technology (TWSE:6869) 17.9% 114.3% Guangzhou Tinci Materials Technology (SZSE:002709) 38.4% 32.6% Gold Circuit Electronics (TWSE:2368) 30.5% 36.8% Fine M-TecLTD (KOSDAQ:A441270) 15.1% 98.4%

Click here to see the full list of 515 stocks from our Fast Growing Asian Companies With High Insider Ownership screener.

Here's a peek at a few of the choices from the screener.

Beijing Yunji Technology

Simply Wall St Growth Rating: ★★★★★☆

Overview: Beijing Yunji Technology Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells commercial service robots across various regions including China, the Middle East, the Americas, South Korea, Japan, and Thailand with a market cap of HK$19.80 billion.

Operations: The company's revenue is primarily derived from its AI Digitalization System, generating CN¥87.93 million, and its Robots and Functional Kits segment, contributing CN¥210.18 million.

Insider Ownership: 23.4%

Beijing Yunji Technology is experiencing rapid revenue growth, projected at 27% annually, surpassing the Hong Kong market average. Despite reporting a net loss of CNY 294.9 million for 2025, the company is expected to become profitable within three years. Recent board changes and inclusion in the S&P Global BMI Index highlight its evolving corporate structure and market presence. The company's strategic investments in R&D and AI upgrades aim to support future expansion and profitability.

Click here and access our complete growth analysis report to understand the dynamics of Beijing Yunji Technology. The valuation report we've compiled suggests that Beijing Yunji Technology's current price could be inflated.SEHK:2670 Earnings and Revenue Growth as at Apr 2026

Beijing HyperStrong Technology

Simply Wall St Growth Rating: ★★★★★★

Overview: Beijing HyperStrong Technology Co., Ltd. designs, develops, integrates, and operates energy storage power stations in China with a market cap of CN¥46.03 billion.

Story Continues

Operations: Beijing HyperStrong Technology Co., Ltd. generates revenue through its activities in designing, developing, integrating, and operating energy storage power stations across China.

Insider Ownership: 22.6%

Beijing HyperStrong Technology demonstrates strong growth potential with earnings forecasted to rise 56.61% annually, outpacing the Chinese market. Revenue is projected to grow at 48.3% per year, significantly above market averages, and recent Q1 results show sales increasing to CNY 2.37 billion from CNY 1.55 billion year-on-year. Despite a high Price-To-Earnings ratio of 48.4x, it remains below industry norms, indicating good relative value amid substantial insider ownership and robust financial performance forecasts.

Dive into the specifics of Beijing HyperStrong Technology here with our thorough growth forecast report. Our comprehensive valuation report raises the possibility that Beijing HyperStrong Technology is priced lower than what may be justified by its financials.SHSE:688411 Ownership Breakdown as at Apr 2026

Shenzhen Dynanonic

Simply Wall St Growth Rating: ★★★★★☆

Overview: Shenzhen Dynanonic Co., Ltd focuses on the research, development, production, and sale of materials for lithium-ion batteries in China, with a market cap of CN¥17.67 billion.

Operations: Shenzhen Dynanonic Co., Ltd generates revenue through its activities in the research, development, production, and sale of lithium-ion battery materials within China.

Insider Ownership: 26.6%

Shenzhen Dynanonic is poised for significant growth, with earnings expected to rise 122.87% annually and revenue projected to grow at 34.4% per year, outpacing the Chinese market. Despite recent volatility in share price, it trades at a substantial discount of 50.5% below its estimated fair value. Recent earnings show improved performance with Q1 sales reaching CNY 4.34 billion and net income turning positive, reflecting strong financial momentum despite past losses.

Click here to discover the nuances of Shenzhen Dynanonic with our detailed analytical future growth report. In light of our recent valuation report, it seems possible that Shenzhen Dynanonic is trading behind its estimated value.SZSE:300769 Ownership Breakdown as at Apr 2026

It does not include indirectly owned stock through other vehicles such as corporate and/or trust entities. All forecast revenue and earnings growth rates quoted are in terms of annualised (per annum) growth rates over 1-3 years.
